content_body: From the moment we pulled up and walked in we were truly amazed. The Mayfly Lodge is the most beautiful, warm, and welcoming cabin we have been to. The perfect mix of modern and rustic decor shows the love and attention to detail of the owner. This was the perfect and most relaxing way to celebrate our 38th and 26th birthdays. So sad we have to leave but without a doubt we will be coming back again and again! Thank you Mayfly Lodge!! Love, the Browns
title: The Most Beautiful Cabin We Have Been To!
